text.title: Test Fixtures Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are drivers present (has_subobjects, has_many_optional_fields, domain_scenarios_named, xdist_workers)?

conclusion.verdict: Use the Builder pattern (fluent with-* methods).

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND has_many_optional_fields == false AND domain_scenarios_named == true

conclusion.verdict: Use Factory + Object Mother (semantic methods on top of Factory).

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND has_many_optional_fields == false AND domain_scenarios_named == false
